name: Swedish Beef Roast
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds Beef chuck or rump roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy kettle or deep frying pan.
2. Add beef roast and brown well on all sides.
3. Add anchovies, onion, salt, bay leaf, peppercorns, brown sugar, vinegar, whiskey, and water. Cover tightly.
4. Cook slowly for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
5. Serve the roast with the pan juice. (The pan juice may be thickened for gravy. One-half cup of cream added makes a delicious gravy.)
